title: NETHER VAULTS
description: Nether Vaults is a vanilla experience that adds challenge chambers in the Nether, adding new weapons, a new type of enemy, and themed trial spawners and vaults for this dimension.
body:
### NEW LAUNCH TRAILER

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FZxyLxkrYAI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




# 1. New Weapon

## 1.1 Combat Axe

The **combat axe** is an exclusive weapon that can only be obtained in the Nether, specifically in the new structures.

* **Features:**

  * High damage with both critical and normal hits.
  * Long cooldown time.

* **How to craft it:**

  1. Obtain the **Combat Axe Blade**, a new item found in **Abyssal Vaults**.
  2. Combine it with a **blaze rod** to create the combat axe.

---

# 2. New Structures

## 2.1 Abyssal Lava Bastion

* Small **chambers** located in the **Nether Wastes**.
* Contain **abyssal spawners** and new **vaults** with treasures, including the **Combat Axe**.

## 2.2 Abyssal Sand Bastion

* Larger and **more difficult** than the previous bastion.
* Has multiple **floors**, each more challenging than the last, leading to the **treasure chamber**.
* Provides **more loot** than the Abyssal Lava Bastions.

---

# 3. New Enemy

## 3.1 Brute Rider

* Combination of a **hoglin** and a **brute piglin**.
* Equipped with **armor**, slow but strong in melee combat.
* Can appear in **groups**, surrounded by guards with the same equipment.
* If defeated, another brute takes its place, maintaining the threat.

---

# 4. New Blocks

## 4.1 Nether Vault

* Contains **enchanted armor, golden apples, blocks, and new items**.
* **Requires:** new **Nether Key**.
* It is the **most common vault** within the bastions.

## 4.2 Abyssal Vault

* Higher quality loot, including:

  * New **music disc**
  * **Netherite upgrades**
  * **Wither skull**
  * **Combat Axe Blade**
* **Requires:** new **Abyssal Key**

## 4.3 Abyssal Spawner

* Summons enemies to **hinder obtaining rewards**.
* Can generate Nether keys and other items.

---

# 5. New Items

## 5.1 Abyssal Bottle

* Found in **bastion chests** and can be **traded with piglins**.
* Grants the **Abyssal Effect**, necessary to face stronger forces in bastions and obtain better loot.

## 5.2 Lava Lobster Stew

* Obtained by **milking a lavalobster**.
* Provides **fire resistance** for a few seconds.

## 5.3 "Pigstep V.2" Disc

* A new version of the **Pigstep** disc.
* Found in the **new bastions**.

## 5.4 Nether Disc Fragment

* Found in **common bastion chests**.
* Can be traded with piglins.
* Collecting **9 fragments** yields the **Pigstep V.2** disc.

---

# 6. New Effect

## 6.1 Abyssal Omen

* Works like the **Bad Omen** in challenge rooms.
* Activates the **second phase of abyssal spawners** and allows obtaining **Abyssal Keys**.
* Can be removed with **milk** or upon **death**, including regeneration with a totem.

---

# 7. New Enchantments

## 7.1 Heavyweight

* Exclusive enchantment for the **Combat Axe**.
* **Effect:** creates a **small area explosion** when performing a critical hit.
* **Impact:** damages nearby enemies and the wielder, increases weapon wear but significantly boosts damage.

## 7.2 Pummeling

* Enchantment with up to **3 levels** for the **Combat Axe**.
* **Effect:** normal hits **stun enemies**, causing **temporary slowness**.
* Enemies can still attack, so it is recommended to **keep distance** during combat.

---
